subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Hearken thou unto the call of Him Who summoneth thee unto God, the Mighty, the Omnipotent. Then rejoice in that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امه الله ان استمعی ندآء من یدعوک الی الله العزیز القدیر ثم افرحی بما
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of prayer, @prayer for women
